seo.title: Trust & Recognition | HeartLink
seo.description: HeartLink's credibility is built on years of community work, cultural leadership and private matrimonial service.

hero.title: A name families can trust.
hero.description: HeartLink is built on years of social work, cultural leadership and private matrimonial experience.

feature.title: Community work that built real trust.
paragraphs: Through Jwala, Gopi Shah has supported women-focused and humanitarian initiatives across India.
This work reflects the same values HeartLink follows today: dignity, privacy, respect and responsibility.

recognition.title: Experience beyond matchmaking.
recognition.description: Families trust people who have already shown responsibility in real life. HeartLink carries that background.

cards.label: Award
cards.title: Dr. Sarojini Naidu International Award
cards.description: Recognition for Gopi Shah's contribution to education, culture and community service.

cards.label: Global work
cards.title: Great Wall of China performance
cards.description: Coordination of a major cultural performance on an international stage.

cards.label: Service
cards.title: COVID-19 support
cards.description: Helped arrange care centres and oxygen support during the crisis.

cards.label: Indian craft
cards.title: Support for artisans
cards.description: Created work opportunities for Indian artisans through hand-crafted design work.

cards.label: Matrimonial trust
cards.title: Five years of Jeevansathi service
cards.description: Honorary matrimonial work that became the foundation for HeartLink.

cards.label: Private office
cards.title: Press and partnership enquiries
cards.description: For awards, speaking, partnerships and press, contact the HeartLink office.

closing.quote: Trust is built over years. HeartLink protects that trust in every introduction.
